svg.text: PROCESS & INSTRUMENTATION DIAGRAM (P&ID) — SOLAR SPRO 20,000 L/DAY
Scale NTS | ISA 5.1 instrument symbology | Sheet 1 of 1 | All process data at design conditions (25°C, 35 g/L NaCl)
6 × Filmtec SW30XHR-400i | 8" × 40" (203 mm OD × 1016 mm per element)
Active membrane area: 6 × 37.2 = 223 m² | FRP vessel Codeline 80S-6, PN 80 bar
Feed: 44.4 m³/d @ 60 bar, 25°C | Recovery: 45% | Rejection: 99.75% | NaCl permeate <500 ppm
Permeate: 20,000 L/d | Brine: 24,400 L/d @ 63.6 g/L | Flux J = 20 L/(m²·h)
CP factor: 1.49 (Graetz–Lévêque) | Effective osmotic pressure π_m = 42.3 bar | NDP = 17.7 bar
Chemical dosing: antiscalant <5 ppm Genesys SW | pH adjust H₂SO₄ to pH 7.5
Thermodynamic min: 0.72 kWh/m³ | Actual SEC (with PX): 3.5 kWh/m³ | η_th = 20.6%
← brine high-pressure side → PX energy recovery (η = 96%)
SOLAR SPRO SYSTEM — P&ID (PROCESS & INSTRUMENTATION DIAGRAM)
